etymology.description: 竹(竹) (zhú, "bamboo") + 其(其) (qí, "his") as phonetic = basket specialization
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠀠 is a variant of 箕(箕) (jī, "basket"), retaining its bamboo imagery with 竹(竹) and using 其(其) as a phonetic element to convey sound. This reflects its specialized usage for carrying items, signified by the bamboo material.
